mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id, o.product_id, o.seckill_activity_id, o.seckill_price, o.quantity, o.total_amount, o.status, o.address_id, o.receiver_name, o.receiver_phone, o.delivery_province, o.delivery_city, o.delivery_district, o.delivery_address, o.coupon_id, o.discount, o.user_coupon_id, o.created_at, o.updated_at, u.username, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url AS product_image_url FROM `order` o JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS sales_amount FROM `order` WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM `order` WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT o.product_id AS productId, COALESCE(p.name, '已删除') AS name, COUNT(*) AS salesCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS salesAmount FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'FAILED') GROUP BY o.product_id ORDER BY salesCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_activity SET available_stock = available_stock - 1 WHERE id = #{activityId} AND available_stock > 0
